title: orthilia obtusata
intro: Orthilia obtusata, also known as round-leaved wintergreen, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating pain and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Orthilia obtusata include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Orthilia obtusata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
